title: Paper accepted in Automatica
description: Our work on backstepping boundary stabilization of coupled parabolic PDEs with spatially varying coefficients has been accepted for publication.

title: Invited talk at the Distributed-Parameter Systems Workshop
description: Presented recent results on data-driven control of thermoacoustic instabilities and the analytical bridges required for practical exponential stability.

title: New preprint on adaptive boundary control
description: A preprint on adaptive boundary control of parabolic PDEs with unknown diffusivity is now available on arXiv.

title: Best paper finalist at CDC 2024
description: Our paper on a separation principle for observer-based boundary control of infinite-dimensional systems was selected as a best-paper finalist.

title: Research visit at TU Delft
description: Started a three-month research visit collaborating on reduced-order modeling and control of energy systems.

title: New project funded
description: The National Research Foundation has funded our project on boundary control kernels for coupled reaction–diffusion systems.

title: Doctoral thesis defended
description: Successfully defended a doctoral thesis on boundary control of partial differential equations, with distinction.
